rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b), while this provision authorizes county/municipal ad valorem exemptions for child-care facility real property. They govern entirely separate exemption categories and do not intersect.
quote: The governing body of a county or municipality may exempt from ad valorem taxation all or part of the appraised value of real property used to operate a child-care facility.
_note: rule_cite (art. VIII, §1-r, child-care facility exemption) appears mismatched to the proposed change targeting residence homestead exemptions; the relevant constitutional provision would be art. VIII, §1-b. No conflict found with the rule as provided.
